title: nephrodium pellucidum
intro: Nephrodium pellucidum, also known as Polypodium pellucidum or Clearwater spleenwort, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally used in Asian medicine, Nephrodium pellucidum has been found to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Nephrodium pellucidum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and even have anti-cancer properties. Nephrodium pellucidum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on individual needs.
